discovery_domain: exact teaching-bank synthesis over residual-consistent repair-program pairs and unique reachable 4x4 state patterns
holdout_domain: sampled 5x5 and 6x6 roots with fixed seeds 99 and 123
strongest_claim: Within the bounded repair-program search, the staged bank-then-rank loop collapses further than expected. The top holdout-ranked residual-consistent repair program is already safe on the exhaustive reachable 4x4 verifier, so the exact minimal teaching bank size for the winner is 0 in this bounded model.
